Core package¶

faceapp package¶

Core FaceApp package.

This package contains reusable base abstractions and local process utilities for extraction, indexing, and search workflows.

faceapp.hello()¶

Return a minimal greeting used by package smoke checks.

Return type:

str

faceapp._base package¶

Abstract interfaces and pipeline primitives used by FaceApp.

faceapp.utils package¶

Utility helpers, process implementations, and storage integrations.

faceapp.utils.pipelines¶

class faceapp.utils.pipelines.LocalImageExtractionPipeline(name='LocalImageExtractionPipeline')¶

Bases: Pipeline

Extracts faces from a single image

Parameters:

name (str)

async ainvoke(path, embedding_models, features, *args, **kwargs)¶
Parameters:

  • path (str)

  • embedding_models (list)

  • features (list)

class faceapp.utils.pipelines.QdrantIndexingPipeline(name='QdrantIndexingPipeline')¶

Bases: Pipeline

Pipeline to format face extractions and upload them to Qdrant

Parameters:

name (str)

faceapp.utils.search¶

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • vector_db (Indexer)

  • embedding_model (str)

  • threshold (float)

async get_matches(img_path, index_name)¶
Parameters:

  • img_path (str)

  • index_name (str)

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • vector_db (Indexer)

  • project_id (str)

  • embedding_models (list)

  • model_thresholds (list)

async find(img_path)¶
Parameters:

img_path (str)

faceapp.utils.storage¶

class faceapp.utils.storage.S3Utils(aws_access_key_id=None, aws_secret_access_key=None, region_name=None)¶

Bases: object

download_file(bucket_name, object_key, download_dir='./downloads')¶

Download a file from S3 and return the local path.

Parameters:

  • bucket_name (str)

  • object_key (str)

  • download_dir (str)

Return type:

str

upload_file(file_path, bucket_name, object_key=None)¶

Upload a local file to an S3 bucket.

Parameters:

  • file_path (str)

  • bucket_name (str)

  • object_key (str | None)

Return type:

bool

list_files(bucket_name, prefix='')¶

List files in an S3 bucket with an optional prefix.

Parameters:

  • bucket_name (str)

  • prefix (str)

Return type:

list

delete_file(bucket_name, object_key)¶

Delete a file from an S3 bucket.

Parameters:

  • bucket_name (str)

  • object_key (str)

Return type:

bool

move_file(source_bucket, source_key, dest_bucket, dest_key=None)¶

Move a file from one S3 bucket to another (copy + delete).

Parameters:

  • source_bucket (str)

  • source_key (str)

  • dest_bucket (str)

  • dest_key (str | None)

Return type:

bool
